chinese_text: 既醉以酒，既飽以德。君子萬年，介爾景福。
translation_text:
You have made us drink to the full of your spirits;
You have satiated us with your kindness.
May you enjoy, O our lord, myriads of years!
May your bright happiness (ever) be increased!

chinese_text: 既醉以酒，爾殽既將。君子萬年，介爾昭明。
translation_text:
You have made us drink to the full of your spirits;
Your viands were set out before us.
May you enjoy, O our lord, myriads of years!
May your bright intelligence ever be increased!

chinese_text: 昭明有融，高朗令終。令終有俶，公尸嘉告。
translation_text:
May your bright intelligence become perfect,
High and brilliant, leading to a good end!
That good end has (now) its beginning:—
The
personators of your ancestors announced it in their blessing.

chinese_text: 其告維何？籩豆靜嘉。朋友攸攝，攝以威儀。
translation_text:
What was their announcement?
'(The offerings) in your dishes of bamboo and wood are clean and
​fine.
Your friends, assisting in the service,
Have done their part with reverent demeanour.

chinese_text: 威儀孔時，君子有孝子。孝子不匱，永錫爾類。
translation_text:
'Your reverent demeanour was altogether what the occasion required;
And also that of your filial son.
For such filial piety, continued without ceasing,
There will ever be conferred blessings upon you.'

chinese_text: 其類維何？室家之壼。君子萬年，永錫祚胤。
translation_text:
What will the blessings be?
'That along the passages of your palace,
You shall move for ten thousand years,
And there will be granted to you for ever dignity and posterity.'

chinese_text: 其胤維何？天被爾祿。君子萬年，景命有僕。
translation_text:
How as to your posterity?
'Heaven invests you with your dignity;
Yea, for ten thousand years,
The bright appointment is attached (to your line).'

chinese_text: 其僕維何？釐爾女士。釐爾女士，從以孫子。
translation_text:
How is it attached?
'There is given you a heroic wife.
There is given you a heroic wife,
And from her shall come the (line of) descendants.'
